name: Savory Stuffed Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients except the stuffing.
3. Pour 2/3 of the mixture into an ungreased loaf pan (9 X 5 X 3 inches), pressing it up the sides of the pan to within 3/4 inch of the top.
4. Spoon the stuffing over the meat mixture in the pan, then cover with the remaining meat mixture.
5. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
6. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing into thick slices.
7. Serve on a heated platter.
MEAT LOAF STUFFING:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet.
2. Add chopped onion (1 small) and celery, cooking until the onion is tender.
3. Remove from heat and stir in remaining stuffing ingredients.
